name: DynaVap The Woodwynd
summary: A slim wood-stemmed DynaVap with an adjustable bowl, for patients who want flame-powered microdosing.
description: The WoodWynd pairs a slim, ergonomic wooden stem with DynaVap's Helix Tip, whose adjustable bowl lets you control dose down to a microdose. The thick chamber walls roast herb evenly for consistent, flavourful vapour, and the oval airport on the stem lets you tune airflow to taste. It slides straight into 10mm water pieces with no tapering needed, and the stainless steel cap is built to last. Heated by butane torch (sold separately), with no battery to charge. Suits patients who want fine dose control and the option of water filtration in a comfortable, hand-friendly device.
